description: CompositionNavy blue shorts made of 100% polyester micro fibre, with two side pockets, elastic waist and branding on left thighWash careHand wash or machine washFittingComfort                                                                                                                                                                        Comfort and style rolled into one, this pair of polyester shorts from adidas ensures your body is free of sweat and can breathe freely, offering a comfortable and dry Fit. Ideal for all fitness and training activities, it also makes for a great wear on casual and relaxed days. The deep side pockets allow you to slip in your essentials when on the run. Team this with performance tees and shoes to hit the mountains, or simple pair it with casual cotton t-shirts and laze away.Model statistics1. The model wears trousers, length of 42"2. Height-5.11", Waist-31"
